data.title: Mill Creek named 2025 Best Property Management Firm by NAHB for innovative tech use, improving resident exp. BOCA RATON, Fla., Feb 19, 2026.
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida on February 19, 2026, Mill Creek Residential unveiled its groundbreaking use of technology to enhance the experience of residents and associates. The company, renowned for its development, ownership, and management of high-quality rental properties throughout the United States, shared their latest achievement.

data.title: Scamnetic drops trade secret claims against BlackCloak, shifts focus to false advertising.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, Scamnetic, Inc. has recently made a significant announcement. The company has decided to withdraw its trade secret claims against BlackCloak. Instead, Scamnetic will shift its focus towards broader accusations of false advertising. This decision comes after a thorough process of examining documents and testimonials from BlackCloak's executives. The review also involved assessing BlackCloak's software in the context of the legal dispute. Through this discovery phase, it became evident that there are notable differences between the services offered by BlackCloak and Scamnetic's own acclaimed identity verification platform, IDevery.

data.title: Concord Technologies marks 30 years in healthcare innovation, driving data interoperability and care delivery.
data.description: Concord Technologies, a leading company in the healthcare industry, is commemorating three decades of groundbreaking innovation and excellence in the field. The company has been at the forefront of facilitating genuine data interoperability and improving care delivery throughout its 30-year journey. This milestone underscores Concord Technologies' unwavering commitment to pushing the boundaries of technology to enhance healthcare services.

data.title: MicroGrid Networks received strategic investment from Palisade Infrastructure for battery energy storage systems in New York City.
data.description: MicroGrid Networks, LLC (MGN), a prominent entity in battery energy storage systems in New York City, has recently finalized a key investment deal. Palisade Infrastructure, alongside SER Capital Partners, has provided crucial backing to MGN to aid its expansion in New York City and nearby areas. This strategic investment is set to invigorate MGN’s growth and propel it to the next stage. The collaboration with Palisade offers MGN access to heightened capital and resources, fostering its development in the region.

data.title: iMused debuts song "The Bag" written by CLEO-P using Arya Starr's DNA as muse, highlighting ethical model with transparent royalties.
data.description: iMused, a flagship platform, is highlighting its ethical approach by promoting creator-led songwriting and offering transparent royalties and credit to the "Muse" whose DNA influences the sound. The platform, launched in Houston on Feb. 19, 2026, is supported by the social impact venture 144K Collective and has received backing from 9th Ward.

data.title: Cloud Haircare expands retail presence with Amazon, CVS, H-E-B, Giant Eagle, and upcoming Sally Beauty launch.
data.description: Cloud Haircare has recently announced an expansion of its retail presence through partnerships with major retailers. This includes collaborations with Amazon, CVS, H-E-B, and Giant Eagle. In addition, Cloud Haircare is set to launch in Sally Beauty stores. This update was issued on 19-Feb-2026 by CLOUD over PR Newswire.

data.title: NexusTek improves its Private Cloud with Nutanix, offering a cost-stable alternative to VMware. DENVER, Feb. 19, 2026.
data.description: NexusTek has recently unveiled upgrades to its NexusTek Private Cloud, now utilizing Nutanix hyperconverged infrastructure to offer VMware customers a clear and dependable route to a contemporary private cloud solution. This move aims to enhance reliability and streamline the transition process for users. The announcement was made in Denver on February 19, 2026.

data.title: Red Cat Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RCAT) to ring Nasdaq bell on Feb 20 before Innovation Day event.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Red Cat Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RCAT), a leading U.S.-based company specializing in advanced all-domain drone and robotic solutions for defense and national security, shared news that their Chief Operating Officer, Christian Ericson, is set to ring the Opening Bell at the Nasdaq Stock Exchange at 9:30 a.m. ET on February 20, 2026.

data.title: Taco Bueno launches loyalty app, offers free Muchacho & introduces Bueno Bucks rewards program. Earn 10 Bucks for every $1.
data.description: In Dallas, Taco Bueno has introduced its new mobile app, which includes the brand's inaugural loyalty program. This marks a significant move for the company as it aims to improve customer experience and offer enhanced rewards for dedicated patrons. Through the Bueno Bucks program on the app, customers can now accumulate 10 points for every dollar spent on their beloved Tex-Mex dishes. This initiative represents Taco Bueno's dedication to recognizing and appreciating their loyal clientele in a more substantial manner.

data.title: Bitcoin struggles to regain momentum at $66,989.92; Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin stagnant. $202.18M liquidated, $133.3M outflows from BTC ETFs. Top gainers: Injective, Kite, UNUS SED LEO.
data.description: Bitcoin's price is stagnant due to ongoing ETF outflows and market fear. The current prices for top cryptocurrencies are: Bitcoin at $66,989.92, Ethereum at $1,942.34, Solana at $81.82, XRP at $1.41, Dogecoin at $0.09785, and Shiba Inu at $0.056234. Coinglass data reveals that 95,957 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, amounting to $202.18 million in losses. SoSoValue data indicates net outflows of $133.3 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs and $41.8 million from spot Ethereum ETFs on Wednesday. Over the same period, top gainers were Injective, Kite, and UNUS SED LEO. In notable developments, Bitcoin and Ethereum futures trading has become available 24/7. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Coleman Cowan named to 2026 'Super Lawyers' list for leading complex litigation at James Scott Farrin.
data.description: Coleman Cowan is currently at the forefront of handling intricate legal cases at the revered Law Offices of James Scott Farrin, where he tirelessly represents clients throughout North and South Carolina. Situated in Durham, N.C., as of February 19, 2026, Cowan, who spearheads the litigation department, has been recognized by "Super Lawyers" for his exceptional prowess in the legal field. This prominent attorney showcases his dedication and expertise in advocating for a diverse range of clients in the region.

data.title: Civil rights attorney Nichad Davis is praised as a 'rising star,' leading a firm that secured a $1.25 billion settlement in a major case.
data.description: Nichad Davis heads the civil rights division at the Law Offices of James Scott Farrin, responsible for obtaining a groundbreaking $1.25 billion settlement in a historic civil rights lawsuit in the United States. Based in Durham, North Carolina, the achievement was recognized on Feb. 19, 2026. Attorney Nichad Davis has also been honored by making it to the 2026 'Rising Stars' list for his exceptional legal contributions.

data.title: NACCO Industries declares a quarterly dividend of 25.25 cents per share on both Class A and B Common Stock. Payable on March 16, 2026.
data.description: Cleveland-based NACCO Industries® (NYSE: NC) revealed today that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of 25.25 cents per share. This dividend applies to both the Class A and Class B Common Stock and is scheduled to be distributed on March 16, 2026.

data.title: Author Kate DiCamillo to deliver the 2026 Welty Lecture at Folger Shakespeare Library on March 26 at 7:30pm.
data.description: In a press release dated Feb. 19, 2026, it was announced that the Folger Shakespeare Library and the Eudora Welty Foundation will be hosting author Kate DiCamillo for the 2026 Welty Lecture on Thursday, March 26 at 7:30pm. DiCamillo, known as one of America's favorite storytellers, will be delivering the lecture inspired by the renowned writer Eudora Welty. This event is set to be a notable evening in literature and is expected to draw a significant audience to celebrate the intersection of these two influential literary figures.

data.title: The Advanced Leadership Institute & Carnegie Mellon U launch 2026 National Executive Leadership Academy in partnership.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Pittsburgh, The Advanced Leadership Institute (TALI) revealed a joint initiative with Carnegie Mellon University's Tepper School of Business (CMU), unveiling the commencement of the 2026 National Executive Leadership Academy (NELA). Serving as TALI's primary program built on a cohort model, this academy aims to groom executives with transformative leadership skills.

data.title: The Coca-Cola Co. Board elects new officer and approves 64th consecutive annual dividend increase by 4% to 53 cents/share.
data.description: In Atlanta, The Coca-Cola Company's Board of Directors revealed the appointment of a new company officer and endorsed the company's 64th straight yearly dividend boost. The quarterly dividend is being raised by about 4%, climbing from 51 cents to 53 cents per common share. This increase brings the annual dividend to $2.12 per share, in comparison to the previous year's $2.04 per share in 2025. The first quarter dividend will be payable on April 1 to shareowners marked as of that date.

data.title: ZERO Prostate Cancer to hold 2026 Summit and Veterans Action Convening in D.C. to enhance care; focuses on lawmakers.
data.description: The 2026 ZERO Prostate Cancer Advocacy Summit is set to be held in Alexandria, Virginia on February 19. The event will take place at the Hilton Washington, D.C. Capitol Hill and will bring together advocates to meet with lawmakers in person to push for initiatives related to prostate cancer. The summit is a crucial platform for discussing important issues and influencing policy decisions.

data.title: NACLB 2026, a commercial lending event in June, is anticipated at Fontainebleau Miami Beach after a brief pause.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Dover, Delaware, the National Alliance of Commercial Loan Brokers (NACLB) announced its upcoming event scheduled for June at the renowned Fontainebleau Miami Beach. This event is highly anticipated and serves as the leading gathering for commercial loan brokers and professionals. Following a hiatus, this year's event is expected to attract a significant number of attendees eager to participate in networking opportunities and industry discussions.
